title: Arsenal fans need to do better & City celebrations too much?
summary: Wayne Rooney critiques Arsenal fans' support during Manchester City's match against Arsenal. The comments highlight concerns about fan engagement during a critical fixture.
content: Wayne Rooney reacts to Manchester City v Arsenal and criticises Arsenal fans' support.

zh.title: 阿森纳球迷需要做得更好 & 曼城庆祝过分
zh.summary: 韦恩·鲁尼批评了阿森纳球迷在曼城对阿森纳比赛中的支持。这些评论突出了人们对关键赛事中球迷参与度的担忧。

title: Arsenal fans must be better to help team in title hunt - Rooney
summary: Wayne Rooney argues Arsenal fans must improve their support to help the team in their faltering Premier League title challenge. Better fan backing could prove crucial in the race.
content: Ex-England and Manchester United captain Wayne Rooney says Arsenal fans "need to be better" in supporting the team in their faltering Premier League title bid.

zh.title: 阿森纳球迷必须更好地帮助球队争夺冠军 - 鲁尼
zh.summary: 韦恩·鲁尼主张阿森纳球迷必须改进支持，以帮助球队在英超冠军争夺中扭转局面。更好的球迷支持可能对比赛至关重要。

title: 📈 Ranked: Top 50 players in Premier League
summary: The Premier League Top 50 ranking returns with just over a month remaining in the 2025-26 season to identify the division's best-performing players.
content: The Premier League Top 50 returns, with just over a month remaining in the 2025-26 season, to rank the best players in the Premier League so far.

zh.title: 📈 排名：英超前50名球员
zh.summary: 英超前50名排名在2025-26赛季还剩一个多月时回归，以评选该赛区表现最佳的球员。

title: Bouda ends Lloris' scoreless run in San Jose win
summary: Ousseni Bouda scored twice in the second half as San Jose Earthquakes defeated Los Angeles FC 4-1 on Sunday. Bouda's goals ended Hugo Lloris' 593-minute scoreless streak.
content: Ousseni Bouda scored two goals in the second half, ending Hugo Lloris' scoreless run to begin the season at 593 minutes, and the San Jose Earthquakes stunned Los Angeles FC 4-1 on Sunday night in an early Western Conference showdown.

zh.title: 博乌达在圣何塞的胜利中终结洛里斯的不失球纪录
zh.summary: 周日，欧森尼·博乌达在下半场攻入两球，帮助圣何塞地震队以4-1战胜洛杉矶FC。博乌达的进球结束了雨果·洛里斯保持的593分钟不失球纪录。
